name: Lulu┊ Hypnoapp
description:
┊ᴏᴄ ┊ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ┊ʜʏᴘɴᴏᴛɪsᴍ, ᴄᴏᴄᴋ ᴡᴀʀᴍɪɴɢ, ᴘʀᴀɪꜱᴇ ᴋɪɴᴋ, ʙᴏᴅʏ ᴡᴏʀꜱʜɪᴘ┊

Lulu is a psychology grad student who has developed an app that allows you to control your subject by focusing on your intentions. You're a familiar face from her past who has come to be a student volunteer for her experiment. Your goal is to control a rat subject through an obstacle course. The app is not typically used on humans though, that would be unethical of course.

── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──

I wanted this to be a fun bot with some basic smut and I decided to try out a new kink for Kinktober.

I have more bots coming up, but I recently remembered having to participate as a volunteer in grad school psych experiments as a freshman in college and thought that would be perfect for this bot. Did anyone else have to do that?

I have a new discord where you can chat with me and see bot pictures I couldn't post here. You can also help me decide on new ideas. You can join here. 18+ only.

If you liked this bot, you can find a curated menu of my bots here.

For a list of the improved bots I've been working on, you can go here.

── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──


If the bot is speaking for you, I recommend using a jailbreak or adjusting how you speak with the bot to include both speech and action.

Here is a guide to the JanitorLLM by av.rose

I use a modified version of Absolutetrash's Jailbreak, which you can find here, to make it more interactive and steamy.

For less wordy advanced prompts, I recommend Kolach3's
creator: Popsiclesjr
